name: Daily Spark Intention
steps: Open the Daily Spark prompt
Each partner adds one intention and one feeling
Schedule a check-in reminder if the day looks stressful

name: Appreciation Swap
steps: Log one appreciation tagged to your partner
Add a why-this-matters note
Invite a response or voice note reply

name: Reconnect & Reset
steps: Share one appreciation
Name one stressor you can release together
Choose a gentle physical cue (hug, massage, slow dance)
Record reflections in a Shared Moment

name: Spin & Spark
steps: Add two playful ideas each to the Ritual Playbook
Spin or randomly pick one idea
Capture a playful reflection afterward

name: Care Kit Routine
steps: Prepare comfort items (snacks, heat packs, entertainment)
Log a Support Moment offering the kit
Check in daily with the Care toggle until energy returns

name: Desire Sync
steps: Log how connected you feel
Share what type of closeness feels accessible today
Choose a low-pressure option from the shared list
Schedule the next check-in

name: Pause & Breathe Reset
steps: Trigger the pause signal
Follow the guided breathing audio
Select a reconvene time
Log the follow-up as a Shared Moment

name: withAurora.love Sunset Exchange
steps: Record a one-minute voice note at sunset
Attach one photo or emoji reaction
Tag the entry 'Co-play' so your partner can respond on their morning

name: Story Arc Evening
steps: Prepare a toast about the past year
Share three highlight memories
Express gratitude
Create a future vow together

name: 60-second Spark
steps: Open the micro Spark prompt
Each partner shares one small joy or need
Log it so the app tracks micro-connection streaks
